failure_reason:
**What went wrong:** I repeatedly checked episodic memory without proceeding to semantic memory, skipping the critical step of verifying semantic memory before writing the 'HIRO round marker' entry.  

**What I'll do differently:** Next time, I will immediately check semantic memory after exhausting episodic searches. If both are empty, I will write the entry and re-scan episodic to confirm its presence, ensuring the cold-start confirmation is properly executed.
